_README: Auto-registered MCP servers for the work-dashboard plugin.
Granola + Gmail + Drive work out of the box (OAuth on first use).

Calendar needs per-user credentials — run /dashboard-setup for guided setup, or set GOOGLE_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS in your environment. Until then it fails to start and the dashboard just shows that section as 'source unavailable'.

Slack is NOT an MCP server here: the slack agent uses the Slack web API with a user token (xoxp-…, search:read) from your macOS keychain (entry `slack_token`). Run: security add-generic-password -s slack_token -a "$USER" -w 'xoxp-...'
